title: Pram and Moses Basket Mattress – Fit to Kinderkraft (Baby Crib - 3 x 1 Lovi) Baby Crib | Breathable | Hypoallergenic | Size 78 x 41 x 04 CM
features: ✅ ● Fits most of Prams, Moses Baskets & Kinderkraft; Baby Crib; 3 in 1 LOVI - Suitable for 0-4 months. 4 cm Thickness Gives Added Comfort with Extra Support.
✅ ● Foam Mattress is Hypo-allergenic with anti-bacterial Quilted reversible Cover. Made in the UK with High Density Nursery Grade Foam CMHR28. With Rounded Corners.
✅ ● Easy to remove luxury hypoallergenic quilted cover that is machine washable at 40’C
✅ ● Healthy sleeping climate in baby carriages: High-quality baby carpet mattress with good lying properties and optimal ventilation. With moisture-regulating, soft Tencel function cover.
✅ ● Meets British Standards (Safety - BS 1877-10 2011 + A1 2012) & (UK Fire regulation - BS7177 2008 + A1 2011) Professionally made in the UK using only nursery grade foam Free from harmful chemicals
description: Product description Our HQ Foam Moses Basket Mattress 78 x 41 x 04 CM Key Features Suitable from birth Perfect for Moses baskets/sleep. It Comes with quilted water-resistant cover which is removable for washing at 40’C It is fully breathable and reversible The core of the mattress is a foam which is free from harmful chemicals in line with new guidelines regarding the fillings for nursery mattresses Please Note Moses basket mattresses should not be too thick Safety Parents are becoming more aware and concerned about chemicals used in the production of products for their children so we pride ourselves in knowing that we do everything possible to keep babies safe when using our mattresses therefore we only use foam that is free from organophosphate flame retardants We meet all relevant British Standards Please check that you are buying an original Mother Nurture product and not a copy Please also check your Moses basket manufacturers safety instructions before buying any mattress Safety Warning DO NOT TUMBLE DRY / WASH WITH SIMILAR COLOURS (COVER ONLY)

specifications_table.Special Features: Antibacterial, Breathable, Double Sided, Removable Cover
